summary: All 20 Sichuan Baosheng users on sc_odoo have internal-user login authority and the owner path, but only 4 users have business-admin authority and no users yet hold PM, finance, or executive business roles.
verification: runtime SQL audit confirms 20/20 users have base.group_user
runtime SQL audit confirms 20/20 users have group_sc_role_owner
runtime SQL audit confirms 4/20 users have group_sc_role_business_admin and effective group_sc_business_full
runtime SQL audit confirms pm_role_users=0, finance_role_users=0, executive_role_users=0

notes: basic system usage authority is present for all customer users
domain-specific business authorization is incomplete because PM/finance/executive roles are still unassigned

next_step: Define and materialize the Sichuan Baosheng authorization matrix before proceeding with business-flow usability verification.
